# OSLMarkUPP

**Type Alias**

Defines a data type for the universal procedure pointer for the `OSLMarkProcPtr` callback function pointer.

## Declaration

```swift
typealias OSLMarkUPP = OSLMarkProcPtr
```

## Discussion

For a description of a mark callback function, see [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/coreservices/oslmarkprocptr].
